description.en: Ad-supported tier — full catalog access with audio ads inserted between tracks, shuffle-only on mobile, no offline. ~250M MAU. The subsidy side: free for users, monetised via brand ads paid by advertisers.
description.zh: 广告支持档 —— 提供完整曲库,曲目之间插入音频广告,移动端只能随机播放,不能离线。约 2.5 亿 MAU。这是补贴方:对用户免费,通过广告主付费的品牌广告变现。
